ops.title: P2b S2-fix: retrieval keying majors resolved
ops.body:
Four review majors in P2b S2 retrieval keying (runtime holes behind compile-time success) now fixed in sweeps.py + shortlist.py + tests; bridge.py untouched.

1. Empty-chain guard (generalized): sweeps._chained_endpoints and shortlist._gateway_dates raise store.NoData (EXIT_NO_DATA=4, zero HTTP) when a chained origin/gateway resolution is empty (empty predecessor shortlist + empty union, no override). shortlist._onward_cmd maps NoData->EXIT_NO_DATA like sweeps._run_cmd. Generalizes HEAD's 'onward sweep has no gateways' to any chained leg/pairs node.

2. onward_minima consumes the compiled pairs node endpoint_source: from->predecessor shortlist dests on observed arrival dates; union/override->concrete airports over the leg window; first-position cash leg (endpoint_source None, inputs [])->own origins over the window; either-after-award falls back to the shortlist input. Closes the S2 DEFERRED GAP (positioning + cash-after-cash were structurally quote-less).

3. stay_nights is now a retrieval consumer: a stay-marked predecessor shifts every arrival-derived date to [arrival+min..arrival+max] in onward bridge_pairs AND in the middle chained sweep window (sweeps._leg_window). No stay -> unchanged same-date. _predecessor(plan,leg_id) mirrors compile_graph's prior_leg fold.

Deferred nit: shortlist._onward_dests still byte-duplicates trips._leg_declared_dests (import would be a private cross-module fn; consolidation candidate for S3 journeys.py). The _gateway_dates endswith('shortlist.json') false-match nit IS fixed (exact '/shortlist.json' leaf).

P3 tuning: first-position/union bridge dates enumerate the whole (tight) leg/trip window -> many bridge pairs; volume optimization deferred to P3 (S3 chain-builder filters via forward alignment).
